name: verify-async-functionapp-deployment-extension
description: Packaging scripts for the Verify Async FunctionApp Deployment Azure DevOps extension.

scripts.validate: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-Content -Raw ./extension-manifest.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw ./VerifyAsyncFunctionAppDeployment/task.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; node --check ./VerifyAsyncFunctionAppDeployment/index.js"
scripts.package: npm run prepare:manifest:breakdown && npm run validate && tfx extension create --manifest-globs ./extension-manifest.generated.json
scripts.package:publisher: npm run prepare:manifest && npm run validate && tfx extension create --manifest-globs ./extension-manifest.generated.json
scripts.publish:publisher: npm run prepare:manifest && npm run validate && tfx extension publish --manifest-globs ./extension-manifest.generated.json
